activities_projects.title: Measuring Force with a Spring Balance
activities_projects.objective: Learn how to measure force using a spring balance
steps: Suspend different objects using a spring balance
Record the force shown on the scale
Compare the forces for different objects

activities_projects.title: Friction Comparison Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how friction depends on surfaces
steps: Roll the toy car on each surface
Measure the distance travelled
Compare which surface produces more friction
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the effect of surface roughness on friction

activities_projects.title: Contact vs Non-Contact Force Study
activities_projects.objective: Distinguish between contact and non-contact forces
steps: Use a magnet to attract paper clips without touching them
Push a book across a table
Classify the forces observed

activities_projects.title: Investigating Air Resistance
activities_projects.objective: Understand the effect of air resistance
steps: Drop a flat sheet of paper and a crumpled sheet together
Observe which reaches the ground first
Explain the role of air resistance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands air resistance as a type of friction

activities_projects.title: Balanced and Unbalanced Forces Experiment
steps: Two students pull a rope with equal force
Observe that the rope does not move
Then one student pulls harder and observe movement

activities_projects.title: Gravity and Mass Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Explore how gravity affects objects of different mass
steps: Drop both balls from the same height
Observe which reaches the ground first
Record and explain the result

activities_projects.title: Buoyancy Experiment
steps: Place each object in water
Observe which objects float and which sink
Explain the role of buoyant force
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands buoyant force and density concept

activities_projects.title: Magnetic Force Distance Study
activities_projects.objective: Study how magnetic force changes with distance
steps: Place paper clips at different distances from the magnet
Observe at what distance attraction occurs
Record the results
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how magnetic force varies with distance

activities_projects.title: Design a Friction Reduction Model
activities_projects.objective: Explore ways to reduce friction in machines
steps: Move the wheel on a board without lubricant
Apply lubricant and repeat
Compare the movement

activities_projects.title: Force in Real-Life Machines Study
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how forces are used in simple machines
steps: Identify three machines such as bicycle, pulley, or lever
Explain how force is applied in each
Describe how it makes work easier
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects force concepts to real machines
